scope: Split frontend file service into domain services
Preserve frontend/src/services/files.ts as the compatibility facade
Extract FileList dialog rendering into a dedicated component
assumptions: Existing fileService imports should continue to work during this slice
Current component directories are the target structure and should be extended, not replaced
This slice prioritizes low-risk domain boundaries over deleting every large legacy file
risks: Object method this-binding can regress upload flow
File System Access API download fallback can regress if stream helpers change behavior
Domain services must not import the aggregate facade
dependencies: Existing api, limitedApi, auth store, telemetry utilities
